title: Noccaea eigii
intro: Noccaea eigii, also known as Alpine Pennycress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is rich in potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Noccaea eigii include glucosinolates, such as glucoraphanin and glucobrassicin, as well as other compounds like isothiocyanates and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Alpine Pennycress is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
